rationale: Neither the MP Materials 10-Q (Q1 2026) nor the Linde 10-Q (Q1 2026) disclose numeric utilization rates, lead times, pricing deltas, or capex guidance changes for the raw-materials bottleneck stage (REE, neon, helium, photoresist precursors); MP's filing references NdPr price floor protection at $110/kg under the DoW PPA and notes "increasing costs or limited access to raw materials" as a risk factor, but provides no hard supply-chain metrics (lead times, utilization %, sequential pricing %) for any of the five binding sub-components.
